solution_criteria: Handles empty/null inputs gracefully without crashing
Provides clear error message or appropriate fallback response
scenario: A scenario with empty or null input values to verify error handling and robustness

prompt_inputs.text: The café's menu features: café au lait (€4.50), crème brûlée, naïve interpretation, résumé review, and Zürich's finest. Special symbols: ™®©℃°↑↓✓✗★☆♠♣♥♦ 🎉🎨🎭. Mathematical: ∑∏∫∂∇≈≠±×÷∞√. Contact: info@café.com. Price: ¥500 or £25 or €20. Encoding test: Привет мир (Hello world), 你好世界, مرحبا بالعالم.

solution_criteria: Correctly identifies and preserves all Unicode characters including accented letters (é, ï, ü), currency symbols (€, ¥, £), mathematical operators (∑, ∫, ∞), emoji, and non-Latin scripts (Cyrillic, Chinese, Arabic)
Maintains proper encoding without garbling or replacing special characters with placeholders
Extracts email address and monetary values with their associated symbols intact
scenario: A scenario with special characters, Unicode symbols, or non-standard formatting to assess encoding and parsing capabilities
